title: Site State (site.json)
description: Per-site state file. Source: plan doc Appendix A, completed with concrete property types. Identity + gate log + external IDs for one site-<slug> repo.

slug.description: URL-safe site identifier, matches repo suffix site-<slug>.

domain.description: Bare production domain, no protocol, no trailing slash.

state.description: Lifecycle state per plan §3.2. PARKED/KILLED are terminal and reachable from any state.

template_tag.description: site-template git tag (or template-v<package-version> fallback) this site was scaffolded from.

scores.description: Selection-engine scorecard (plan §2.1), null until P1/G1 runs.

gates.description: Append-only gate-pass log (plan §3.3: 'scripts and skills append; humans/AI never hand-edit gate history').

evidence.description: File paths, URLs, or command output snippets proving the gate's objective checks passed.

external.description: External system IDs (plan §3.3 / §4.7). Null until provisioned.

ESTIMATES.description: Any unverified numbers carried in content, per plan §7.1 rule 3 ([ESTIMATE] labeling).
